name: HR attendance policy example
answer:
Employees must notify their manager before missing a scheduled shift.
Employees may work remotely every Friday without approval.
Employees can request an attendance exception through People Operations.

sources.title: HR Attendance Policy
sources.content:
Employees must notify their manager before missing a scheduled shift.
Employees may work remotely on Fridays with manager approval.
Employees can request an attendance exception through People Operations.
